title: Mock Frontend Interview
subtitle: Final day — five timed rounds, self-evaluation, graduation checklist, and FrontForge React Interview Track complete
prerequisites: week1 — components, props, useState, forms, routing fundamentals
week2 — APIs, custom hooks, Context, dynamic routes, machine coding Round 2
week3 — Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, authentication, performance, dashboards
day22 — machine coding interview, debugging drills, code review
day23 — production refactor, architecture discussion, senior interview prep
expectedOutcome: Complete five timed mock interview rounds under realistic conditions
Demonstrate JavaScript, React, machine coding, project discussion, and debugging fluency
Explain FrontForge architecture, JSON renderer, and design decisions confidently
Self-evaluate honestly across JavaScript, React, TypeScript, Redux, performance, machine coding, project discussion, and communication
Finish the FrontForge React Interview Track ready to apply for frontend engineer roles
definitionOfDone: Round 1 JavaScript completed in 30-minute time box
Round 2 React completed in 30-minute time box
Round 3 Machine Coding completed in 60-minute time box — no AI, no Google, official docs only
Round 4 Project Discussion — FrontForge architecture, JSON renderer, challenges, improvements
Round 5 Debugging — React bugs, performance, TypeScript errors, routing issues fixed
Self-evaluation rubric completed for all eight categories
Reflection submitted — last entry in the track
